title: Content Opportunity Decision — Day 5
reason: No new GSC queries with meaningful volume. All 25 queries are low-impression (1-2 each) and heavily skewed toward 20000-loan queries. The Emergency Fund Guide was just created on Day 3 — needs time to get indexed and generate data before deciding on a second page.
auditor_recommendation: Improve EXISTING pages when cooldown expires (Day 7). Create second page no earlier than Day 7-8, targeting a query with proven demand (10+ impressions).
candidates_for_day7: Roth IRA calculator guide (roth-ira got submitted GSC UI, awaiting data)
Retirement withdrawal guide (retirement-withdrawal — submitted GSC UI)
Budget planner deep dive (budget-planner is T1 indexed — strong hub for content)
